text.title: Business Process Analysis — Enterprise Scale and Governance Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Programme covers ≥100 processes AND/OR auditor sign-off required?

conclusion.verdict: Run two-tier orchestration: portfolio agent + per-process agents with BPMN convention guide.
Pareto-cut: deep-model only top decile by nva_minutes_per_year, narrative-document the rest.
Add per-L2 ownership decision log citing deal-thesis for every acquirer/target/hybrid choice.
Enforce adopt→configure→extend→build order; document each gap with explicit decision type.
Use lightweight process mapping instead; BPA enterprise overhead is unjustified for <100-process scope without audit.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
